name: Bahamian Macaroni and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 8 oz elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the onion, green pepper, and celery to the macaroni; stir.
2. Add half of the cheese and stir over low heat until melted.
3. Season with salt and stir in evaporated milk.
4. Spoon into a well-greased 8x8x2 inch baking pan and sprinkle remaining cheese evenly on top.
5. Bake in a pre-heated oven at 350°F for 20 minutes.
6. Let stand for 10 minutes and cut into squares to serve.
Yield: 4-6 servings
